eurusd.title: Euro: Downtrend versus US Dollar intact with key 1.1600 level – UOB
eurusd.summary: United Overseas Bank’s (UOB) Quek Ser Leang and Lee Sue Ann report EUR/USD has rebounded from 1.1607 but expects further gains to face strong resistance at 1.1685 in the near term.

eurusd.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: 1.1655 acts as key barrier for Euro bulls
eurusd.summary: The EUR/USD pair trades 0.18% lower to near 1.1635 during the European trading session on Tuesday. The major currency pair faces selling pressure as the US Dollar (USD) resumes its upside journey amid firm expectations that the Federal Reserve (Fed) will not cut interest rates this year.

eurusd.title: EURUSD Zigzag Correction Points to Elliott Wave Support at 1.148–1.160
eurusd.summary: EURUSD is unfolding a corrective zigzag structure from the April 17, 2026 high. First, wave A ended at 1.1655, establishing the initial leg of the decline. eurusd.title: Euro weakens below 1.1650 as Iran uncertainty supports US Dollar
eurusd.summary: The EUR/USD pair trades in negative territory around 1.1645 during the early Asian trading hours on Tuesday. The Euro (EUR) softens against the US Dollar (USD) amid persistent uncertainty in the Middle East surrounding Iran.

gbpusd.title: British Pound softens as UK political turmoil, hawkish Fed bets weigh
gbpusd.summary: The GBP/USD pair loses ground to near 1.3415 during the Asian trading hours on Tuesday. The British Pound (GBP) edges lower against the Greenback amid UK political turmoil. Traders will take more cues from the UK employment report, which is due later on Tuesday.

xauusd.title: Gold sticks to intraday losses as geopolitics and Fed hike bets underpin US Dollar
xauusd.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) extends its steady intraday descent heading into the European session on Tuesday and remains close to the lowest level since March 30, set the previous day.

xauusd.title: India Gold price today: Gold falls, according to FXStreet data
xauusd.summary: Gold prices fell in India on Tuesday, according to data compiled by FXStreet.

xauusd.title: Gold Price Forecast: XAU/USD sellers retain control whilst below 21-day SMA near $4,650
xauusd.summary: Gold is back in the red around $4,550 in Asia on Tuesday, having faced rejection once again just shy of the $4,600 mark, as markets digest the latest developments around the conflict between the United States (US) and Iran.

xauusd.title: Gold Eases Amid Middle East Uncertainty
ICYMI - Goldman cuts US recession odds to 25% as Hormuz closure impact stays contained
xauusd.summary: Goldman Sachs cuts its 12-month US recession probability to 25% from 30%, with chief economist Jan Hatzius citing resilient activity and easing financial conditions despite the Strait of Hormuz closure.Summary:US recession probability cut to 25% from 30%, with economic activity holding up and financ

xauusd.title: Gold price hold steadies, silver rebounds as Hormuz risk keeps oil, yields in focus - PM Report
Ghana seeks 30% of large gold mines’ output for local refineries
xauusd.summary: Africa’s largest bullion producer is seeking an additional 10% on top of the current 20% that large mines must sell to the state-owned Ghana Gold Board.

xauusd.title: Gold Price Forecast: XAU/USD buyers are losing the battle
xauusd.summary: XAU/USD bottomed at $4,480 at the beginning of the week, its lowest since late March, as a dismal market sentiment fueled demand for the US Dollar (USD).

xauusd.title: Zambia forms gold venture to formalize mining, build processing
xauusd.summary: The new vehicle will operate in a part of North-Western Province that was the site of a disorderly gold rush that began last year.

xauusd.title: Russia fails to sell stake in gold miner UGC as no one bids at auction
xauusd.summary: The 67.2% stake in UGC - one of Russia's top 10 gold miners - was valued at 140.43 billion roubles.
